subject: Correction to GCN Circular 14682 (GRB 130518B)
body:
J. R. Cummings (UMBC/CRESST/GSFC) and H. A. Krimm (USRA/CRESST/GSFC) report on 
behalf of the Swift-BAT team:

In the first sentence of GCN Circular 14682 (Cummings), we incorrectly named the 
GRB.  The burst that provided Swift/BAT trigger #556105 should be named GRB 
130518B, consistent with the subject line.  We apologize for any confusion.
